Affected versions:

Description: 
 
By sending a deeply nested ASN1 structure to a Apache Kerby client or service, it's possible to trigger a StackOverFlow  
Exception which can lead to denial of service issues. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.1.2, which fixes  
this issue.

The Apache Airflow FTP provider's `FTPSHook.get_conn()` created an `ftplib.FTP_TLS` connection but never called

items.title: FBI Warns Russian Intelligence Hackers Target Signal Backup Recovery Keys
items.summary:

Hand it over once, and the attacker can restore the account's backup, read the private and group message history, and take over the account. Worse, the key keeps working.
